UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, DEFENDANT TIMOTHY BROWN'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS DENIED. MOVING PARTY FAILED TO COMPLY WITH CRC 3.1350 (B), I.E. FAILED TO STATE THE ISSUES TO BE ADJUDICATED IN THE NOTICE OF MOTION AND REPEAT THEM, VERBATIM, IN THE SEPARATE STATEMENT OF UNDISPUTED MATERIAL FACTS. SPECIFICALLY, (1) NOTICE OF MOTION LISTS THE ISSUES TO BE SUMMARILY ADJUDICATED AS "THE FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION (FOR SPECIFIC PERFORMANCE), THE SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION (FOR BREACH OF CONTRACT) ', ON THE BASIS THAT DEFENDANT IS ENTITLED TO JUDGMENT ON SUCH CAUSES OF ACTION BECAUSE NO ENFORCEMENT CONTRACT WAS FORMED WITH PLAINTIFFS TOBONI FOR THE SALE OF THE REAL PROPERTY WHICH IS THE SUBJECT OF THE ALLEGED CONTRACT, OR SIGNED BY SULLIVAN OR AN AUTHORIZED AGENT;" AND (2) SEPARATE STATEMENT LISTS THE ISSUES TO BE ADJUDICATED AS, FOR EXAMPLE "ISSUES NO. 1: DEFENDANT IS ENTITLED TO JUDGMENT ON THE FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION FOR SPECIFIC PERFORMANCE BECAUSE THE CONTRACT ALLEGED IS NOT EXECUTED BY SELLER VERMONT STREET TOWN HOMES OR A DULY AUTHORIZED AGENT." UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, DEFENDANT ANGUS MCCARTHY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS DENIED. MOVING PARTY FAILED TO COMPLY WITH CRC 3.1350 (B), I.E. FAILED TO STATE THE ISSUES TO BE ADJUDICATED IN THE NOTICE OF MOTION AND REPEAT THEM, VERBATIM, IN THE SEPARATE STATEMENT OF UNDISPUTED MATERIAL FACTS. SPECIFICALLY, (1) NOTICE OF MOTION LISTS THE ISSUES TO BE SUMMARILY ADJUDICATED AS "THE EIGHTH CAUSE OF ACTION (FOR DECLARATORY RELIEF AS TO CONTRACT) ON THE BASIS THAT DEFENDANT ANGUS MCCARTHY IS ENTITLED TO JUDGMENT ON SUCH CAUSES [SIC] OF ACTION BECAUSE NO ENFORCEMENT [SIC] CONTRACT WAS FORMED WITH PLAINTIFFS TOBONI FOR THE SALE OF THE REAL PROPERTY WHICH IS THE SUBJECT OF THE ALLEGED CONTRACT, OR SIGNED BY SULLIVAN OR AN AUTHORIZING [SIC] AGENT. IN ADDITION, PLAINTIFFS CANNOT MEET THE ELEMENTS REQUIRED BY SPECIFIC PERFORMANCE. THEREFORE, IF PLAINTIFFS ARE ENTITLED TO ANY RELIEF UNDER THEIR CAUSE OF ACTION FOR DECLARATORY RELIEF, IT IS FOR DAMAGES FROM THE OTHER DEFENDANTS, NOT ANGUS MCCARTHY;" AND AND (2) SEPARATE STATEMENT LISTS THE ISSUE TO BE ADJUDICATED AS "ISSUE NO. 1: DEFENDANT IS ENTITLED TO JUDGMENT ON THE EIGHTH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR DECLARATORY RELIEF AS TO THE DUTIES ARISING OUT OF SUCH CONTRACT BECAUSE _____ ." PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. REPORTER JULIE ANNE ZIEGLER, 	570.

MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION Of Issues And Exhibit Appendix
Off Calendar May-29-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
J. Brian McCauley, Esq., Attorney at Law, (415-974-1515), for Timothy Brown, Defendant and moving party.
Andrew A. August, Esq. of Browne George Ross, (415-269-7273), for Joe Taboni, Plaintiff and opposing party.
Andrew J. Wiegel, Esq. & G. Ryan Patrick, Esq. of Weigel Law Group, (415-552-8230), for Angus McCarthy, Defendant.
Reporter Julie Anne Ziegler, 570, (415-274-9977).

ARGUED. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral arguments adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT ANGUS MCCARTHY's MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION is DENIED. Moving party failed to comply with CRC 3.1350 (b), i.e. failed to state the issues to be adjudicated in the notice of motion and repeat them, verbatim, in the separate statement of undisputed material facts. Specifically, (1) Notice of Motion lists the issues to be summarily adjudicated as "the Eighth Cause of action (for declaratory relief as to contract) on the basis that defendant Angus McCarthy is entitled to judgment on such causes [sic] of action because no enforcement [sic] contract was formed with plaintiffs Toboni for the sale of the real property which is the subject of the alleged contract, or signed by Sullivan or an authorizing [sic] agent. In addition, Plaintiffs cannot meet the elements required by specific performance. Therefore, if Plaintiffs are entitled to any relief under their cause of action for declaratory relief, it is for damages from the other defendants, not Angus McCarthy;" and and (2) Separate Statement lists the issue to be adjudicated as "ISSUE No. 1: Defendant is entitled to judgment on the eighth cause of action for declaratory relief as to the duties arising out of such contract because _____ ." Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Reporter Julie Anne Ziegler, 570.
